subcodes.first_line: O pure soul! The essence of sanctification is the way of the righteous ones, and the ultimate desire of them that stand faithful at His Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پاک جان جوهر تقدیس شیوه راستان است و منتهی آرزوی ملازمان آستان از حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
